title: Intimacy in the age of AI
description: Speakers: Jimmie Stone (VP, Global Head of Creative Shop, Meta); Rob Reilly (Global Chief Creative Officer, WPP). A live podcast recording exploring the 'audience of one' — how human emotion remains the most critical variable in the world's most sophisticated algorithms, and how brands are evolving from mass communication to intimate, conversational experiences in the agentic age.

title: Pass or play with NBA champion and entrepreneur Kyle Kuzma
description: Featuring Kyle Kuzma (NBA Champion, Entrepreneur and Investor). A rapid-fire 'Ask Me Anything' Q&A with a twist — you ask, he decides: pass or play. From life on the court to business moves off it, audience members ask Kyle their most pressing questions.

title: Beauty on the beach
description: Speakers: Ajaa Long (Director, Global Clients, Meta); Brent Mitchell (VP of Social Media and Influencers, Sephora); Jackie Aina (Co-Founder of FORVR MOOD and Content Creator). How a new generation of creator-led beauty brands build culture, drive commerce and connect authentically — and what it takes to build a brand where the founder's identity and the brand's purpose are inseparable.

title: The math and magic of marketing
description: Speakers: Alex Schultz (VP Analytics and Chief Marketing Officer, Meta); Asmita Dubey (Global Chief Digital Officer and Executive Committee Member, L'Oréal). Two leaders who see the future of marketing first unpack the ideas most marketers are still afraid to say out loud — navigating the accelerated AI landscape, creators as the new storefronts, and why the 'brand vs. performance' debate is already settled.

title: Launch in translation
description: Speakers: Derya Matras (VP, Global Business Group, EMEA, Meta); Jasmine Ezz (CMO, Trivago N.V.); Vincenzo Riili (CMO, IKEA Retail / Ingka Group). Global reach is a given, but global resonance is the new luxury. How the world's most iconic brands maintain a consistent voice while speaking a thousand local dialects — going beyond translation to true creative localization.

title: Fueled by innovation
description: Speakers: Andrea Gellert (VP, Business Marketing Group, Meta); Toto Wolff (Team Principal and CEO, Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team). How an F1 team treats communication infrastructure with the same precision as aerodynamics — from encrypted pit-crew conversations on WhatsApp during a race to a 6.5M-strong fan community built on WhatsApp channels. Intelligence only matters at the point someone acts on it.

title: Matched on Marketplace
description: Speakers: Goksu Nebol-Perlman (VP, Product Marketing, Meta); Kevin Blazaitis (President, Creo); Paul Toms (Global CMO, Wayfair); Maurice Harris (Artist & Creator, Bloom & Plume). How the best creator partnerships actually happen — how Creator Marketplace matches brands with creators built for their goals, the signals smart marketers use, and why Meta technologies have become the home court for partnerships that move culture and commerce.

title: Scoring fans beyond the field
description: Speakers: Nicola Mendelsohn (Head of Global Business Group, Meta); Jane Wakely (EVP, Chief Consumer Marketing and Growth Officer, International Foods); Russell Wilson (Super Bowl Champion Quarterback, Entrepreneur, Sports Owner and Philanthropist). Why the brands winning in sports have a formidable presence in the culture that lives alongside the games — the group chats, memes and armchair sportscasters running on Meta technologies.

title: One brief. Two creators.
description: Speakers: Ceci Seitun (Director, Head of Creative Shop, Americas, Meta); Jaleesa Jaikaran (Pro Makeup Artist and Content Creator); Alanna Doherty (Founder + Digital Creator). What happens when two creators get the same brand brief and the same creative tools? A rare look inside the creative process — two interpretations, different choices, two completely different Reels — and a window into what makes creator-led creative so influential.

title: Main character energy: a Gen Z debrief
description: Speakers: Kristie Dash (Strategic Partner Manager, Creator Partnerships, Meta); Tiff Baira (Creator, Host, Author); Davis Burleson (Host, Creator and Cultural Tastemaker); Beca Michie (Model, Actor, and Creator). The creators Gen Z actually listens to pull back the curtain on what's trending — niche aesthetics, viral sounds, micro-communities — and unfiltered insights on how to dominate the feed with thumb-stopping Reels and Stories.

title: The new creative arsenal
description: Speakers: William Cebron (Director, Head of Innovation Partners, Meta); Laila Gohar (Artist); Louise Boyce (Founder, Mama Still Got It!). Wearables are changing how we see and AI is changing how we make. The intersection of artistry and automation — the thrill and complexity of using AI, and what it takes to own your voice while keeping the work authentic.

title: Your creator experience (workshop)
description: Workshop. Facilitators: Gil Chaimovsky, Andrea Campos (Creative Strategists, Meta). A hands-on session, with real cases from brands already building this way, to imagine a creator experience for your brand and walk away with a framework to turn creator collabs into partnerships that compound over time.

title: Your creator experience (workshop)
description: Workshop. Facilitators: Gil Chaimovsky, Andrea Campos (Creative Strategists, Meta). A hands-on session, with real cases from brands already building this way, to imagine a creator experience for your brand and walk away with a framework to turn creator collabs into partnerships that compound over time.

title: Your creator experience (workshop)
description: Workshop. Facilitators: Gil Chaimovsky, Andrea Campos (Creative Strategists, Meta). A hands-on session, with real cases from brands already building this way, to imagine a creator experience for your brand and walk away with a framework to turn creator collabs into partnerships that compound over time.

title: Creator archetypes (workshop)
description: Workshop. Facilitators: Shay Fan (Social Lead, Instagram for Business, Meta), Hardeep Gill (Creative Strategist, Meta), with Louis Rubi (Designer & Artist), Ellen Sheidlin 'sheidlina' (Artist), and Ron 'Boss' Everline (Health & Wellness Expert, JustTrain). Distinct creator archetypes each bring a unique cultural lens, showing how creative play paired with the right platform strategy becomes scalable business performance.
